tagline: Eternal City Highlights & Hidden Culinary Gems

activities.title: Colosseum VIP Fast-Track Exploration
activities.description: Step into the iconic amphitheater with skip-the-line access before peak midday crowds arrive.

activities.title: Authentic Roman Pasta at Osteria da Fortunata
activities.description: Watch pasta chefs hand-roll fresh strozzapreti while savoring classic carbonara and cacio e pepe.

activities.title: Pantheon Interior & Piazza Navona Sunset
activities.description: Marvel at the ancient dome's oculus in late afternoon light, followed by artisanal gelato near Bernini's fountains.

activities.title: Vatican Museums & Sistine Chapel Early Entry
activities.description: Experience Michelangelo's masterpiece in tranquility before general admission doors open.

activities.title: Market Lunch at Mercato di Testaccio
activities.description: Feast on gourmet Roman street food, from tender panino con bollito to artisanal Sicilian cannoli.

activities.title: Sunset Aperitivo in Trastevere Alleyways
activities.description: Wander ivy-draped cobblestone streets and enjoy Aperol spritzes accompanied by complimentary local tapas.

activities.title: Trevi Fountain & Spanish Steps Morning Stroll
activities.description: Toss a coin into the sparkling fountain early in the day, then climb the famous travertine steps.

activities.title: Rooftop Dining at Terrazza Borromini
activities.description: Enjoy gourmet Italian gastronomy with breathtaking 360-degree panoramic views overlooking Piazza Navona.

activities.title: Villa Borghese Gardens & Sunset at Pincio Terrace
activities.description: Relax in Rome's most beloved park and watch the sun dip below the St. Peter's Basilica skyline.
